title: Convert FLAC to WAV
documentation:
## Purpose

Decodes a FLAC file and writes it as 16-bit signed PCM WAV. Both formats are lossless; this is a re-container, useful when downstream caps require WAV.

## Inputs

A FLAC file.

## Outputs

A 16-bit signed PCM WAV file. Source bit depths above 16 are dithered down.

args.arg_description: Path to the FLAC file to convert
